html:
Exclusive to:

“Adds 25 points of moisture to Garden Soil per use.

Can also put out fires and stop smouldering.”

-

The Watering Can is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them update. It is prototyped at the Science Machine with two Boards and one Rope.

Watering cans are used to add 25 points of moisture to a Farm Soil Tile in order to improve Farm Plant growth and reduce Plant Stress. It can also extinguish Fires and Smoldering.

The Watering can has 40 uses, and can be refilled fully at Ponds, Hot Springs, the Oasis Lake, and Vitreoases. Ice and Water Balloons can be used to refill it by 1 use, while Snowballs refill it by 0.3 uses.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Farmhands Collection
Homespun Watering Can
With a little care and attention, it could be good as new.
Woven - Elegant
Decorator's Collection
Cactus Water Can
A prickly pear with water to spare.

Trivia

  • The Watering Can and the Waterfowl Can were introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.
  • The blueprint requirement was replaced with prototyping in the March 2022 QoL update.

Gallery

  • Homespun Watering Can Dropped

wateringcan
“I can water the plants with this.”
–Wilson
“Ugh, who put this water here?!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will give garden a drink!”
–Wolfgang
“I could water the ground well enough with my tears.”
–Wendy
“HATEFUL”
–WX-78
“A standard watering can.”
–Wickerbottom
“Better take my turn watering the garden.”
–Woodie
“Surely someone else can do these menial tasks?”
–Maxwell
“Watering the garden is nöt a task befitting a warriör.”
–Wigfrid
“We're going to go water the garden now!”
–Webber
“Perhaps the garden might like a little drink, non?”
–Warly
“Drink can”
–Wormwood
“Pretty straightforward.”
–Winona
“A watering can, what an excellent plan!”
–Wortox
“Splishy splashy can.”
–Wurt
“Come on Woby, let's see if the plants need some water.”
–Walter
“Gardens need so much attention.”
–Wanda
“Adds 25 points of moisture to Garden Soil per use.
Can also put out fires and stop smouldering.”
-
The Watering Can is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them update. It is prototyped at the Science Machine with two Boards and one Rope.
Watering cans are used to add 25 points of moisture to a Farm Soil Tile in order to improve Farm Plant growth and reduce Plant Stress. It can also extinguish Fires and Smoldering.
The Watering can has 40 uses, and can be refilled fully at Ponds, Hot Springs, the Oasis Lake, and Vitreoases. Ice and Water Balloons can be used to refill it by 1 use, while Snowballs refill it by 0.3 uses.

Can also put out fires and stop smouldering.}} The '''Watering Can''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' and introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]'' update. It is prototyped at the [[Science Machine]] with two [[Boards]] and one [[Rope]]. Watering cans are used to add 25 points of moisture to a [[Farm Soil Tile]] in order to improve [[Farm Plant]] growth and reduce [[Farm Plant#Stress|Plant Stress]]. It can also extinguish [[Fire]]s and [[Summer|Smoldering]]. The Watering can has 40 uses, and can be refilled fully at [[Pond]]s, [[Hot Spring]]s, the [[Oasis Lake]], and [[Vitreoasis|Vitreoases]]. [[Ice]] and [[Water Balloon]]s can be used to refill it by 1 use, while [[Snowball]]s refill it by 0.3 uses. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Tools Skins|Belongings}}
